untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental analysis of supply/demand (inventory levels, production capacity, consumption trends) and institutional positioning data which are NOT available in the allowed indicator set. The 15-20% move from 'structural inflection point' and 'multi-year confirmation' concepts cannot be operationalized without external fundamental data sources. Translation uses price/200-MA/volume as technical proxies only.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally about value/structural analysis rather than technical patterns. Translated using sma_200 as trend confirmation and vol_ratio_20 as proxy for institutional activity, but this severely undershoots the original intent. The original requires supply/demand analysis, inventory tracking, and fundamental thesis validation—none of which are available in technical indicators alone. Hold period set to ~3 years (756 trading days) per spec. A proper implementation would require integration with fundamental data APIs.
